title: Fıstık Ağacı — 47 s site walkthrough (CONDITIONAL)
description: Pre-recorded transcript of Kimi K2.6's analysis of a 47-second walk-around video at the basement-1 retaining-wall pour. Used when MOONSHOT_API_KEY is unset so the /video page still demos.
summary_en: Cage geometry mostly matches the S-04 sheet but the bottom-left of the retaining wall is short on cover and a section of stirrup spacing has drifted in the confinement zone. Conditional pour pending re-bind and a re-photo with a tape measure in frame.
summary_tr: Donatı kafesi büyük ölçüde S-04'e uygun ama istinat duvarının sol-alt köşesinde paspayı yetersiz, sıkı sarmal bölgesinde etriye aralığı kaymış. Yeniden bağlama + cetvelle yeniden fotoğraf çekilmeden döküm önerilmez.

findings.title: Reference marker not in frame
findings.detail: First 8 seconds pan over the cage without any tape, ruler or person for scale. Cover thickness later in the clip is therefore inferred, not measured.

findings.title: Cover < 25 mm at column base
findings.detail: Bottom-left of column S2 reads roughly 22 mm cover where TS 500 7.3 minimum is 25 mm. Plastic spacer absent on the earth-facing side.

findings.title: Stirrup spacing drift in confinement zone
findings.detail: Three Ø10 stirrups in the bottom 1 m of the column show ~140 mm pitch; spec is 100 mm in the confinement zone. Re-tie before pour.

findings.title: Lap splice length OK
findings.detail: Camera pauses on a lap splice at axis B; visible overlap is ~40Ø — meets TS 500 7.2 requirement.

findings.title: Plastic spacer missing on retaining-wall earth face
findings.detail: At 0:33 the camera shows the back face of the retaining wall — no plastic spacers visible. Earth contact requires 50 mm cover; without spacers this drops to whatever the cage rests on.

findings.title: Concrete debris at trench bottom
findings.detail: Loose chunks from the previous form lift visible at the trench bottom. Sweep before pour or fines will compromise bond.
